scripts.build:admin: vite build --config vite.admin.config.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='dist/admin-panel';const dest='backend/public/admin-panel';fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.copyFileSync(dest+'/admin.html',dest+'/index.html');const logo='public/assets/cqpm-logo.jpg';if(fs.existsSync(logo))fs.copyFileSync(logo,dest+'/logo.jpg')"
